title: Tag System Refactor (Two Subsystems: PostTag + User-Tag)

tasks.title: Add TagTypeEnum and TagTypePgEnum to enums files
tasks.description:
Create the `TagTypeEnum` TypeScript enum and corresponding `TagTypePgEnum` Drizzle pgEnum.

**Files to create/modify:**
- Create: `packages/schemas/src/enums/tag-type.enum.ts` — export `TagTypeEnum` with values `INTERNAL | SYSTEM | USER`; export `TagTypeSchema` as `z.nativeEnum(TagTypeEnum)`
- Modify: `packages/schemas/src/enums/index.ts` — add export for `tag-type.enum.ts`
- Modify: `packages/db/src/schemas/enums.dbschema.ts` — add `tagTypePgEnum = pgEnum('tag_type', ['INTERNAL', 'SYSTEM', 'USER'])` following existing pgEnum patterns

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/schemas/src/__tests__/enums/tag-type.enum.test.ts`
- Assert: all 3 values present in enum; `TagTypeSchema.parse('INTERNAL')` succeeds; `TagTypeSchema.parse('INVALID')` throws ZodError
- References: AC-F01, AC-F02, D-002

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- `TagTypeEnum.INTERNAL`, `TagTypeEnum.SYSTEM`, `TagTypeEnum.USER` all exist
- pgEnum values match TS enum
- No `TagScopeEnum` — that model is explicitly rejected per D-002

tasks.title: Expand EntityTypeEnum with 4 new values
tasks.description:
Add `CONVERSATION`, `REVIEW`, `BILLING_SUBSCRIPTION`, `PAYMENT` to the existing `EntityTypeEnum`.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/schemas/src/enums/entity-type.enum.ts` — add 4 values to the TS enum
- `packages/db/src/schemas/enums.dbschema.ts` — add the same 4 values to `entityTypePgEnum`

**Important:** `POST` remains valid in `EntityTypeEnum` (users can apply USER tags to posts via `r_entity_tag`). Per D-019.

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/schemas/src/__tests__/enums/entity-type.enum.test.ts`
- Assert: all 4 new values exist alongside the 5 existing ones; total count = 9; `EntityTypeSchema.parse('BILLING_SUBSCRIPTION')` succeeds
- References: AC-F15, D-019

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- EntityTypeEnum contains exactly: `ACCOMMODATION`, `DESTINATION`, `USER`, `POST`, `EVENT`, `CONVERSATION`, `REVIEW`, `BILLING_SUBSCRIPTION`, `PAYMENT`
- pgEnum in Drizzle schema mirrors the TS enum

tasks.title: Add all 24 new permissions to PermissionEnum
tasks.description:
Add 19 user-tag permissions + 5 PostTag permissions to `PermissionEnum` in a single atomic edit.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/schemas/src/enums/permission.enum.ts` — add in a `// Tag System (SPEC-086)` section:
  - User-Tag: `TAG_INTERNAL_CREATE`, `TAG_INTERNAL_UPDATE`, `TAG_INTERNAL_DELETE`, `TAG_INTERNAL_VIEW`, `TAG_INTERNAL_ASSIGN`, `TAG_SYSTEM_CREATE`, `TAG_SYSTEM_UPDATE`, `TAG_SYSTEM_DELETE`, `TAG_SYSTEM_VIEW`, `TAG_USER_CREATE`, `TAG_USER_UPDATE_OWN`, `TAG_USER_DELETE_OWN`, `TAG_USER_VIEW_OWN`, `TAG_USER_DELETE_ANY`, `TAG_VIEW_ALL_USER_TAGS`, `TAG_VIEW_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS`, `TAG_ASSIGN_VIEW`, `TAG_ASSIGN_ADD`, `TAG_ASSIGN_REMOVE`
  - PostTag: `POST_TAG_CREATE`, `POST_TAG_UPDATE`, `POST_TAG_DELETE`, `POST_TAG_VIEW`, `POST_TAG_ASSIGN`
- Note: `TAG_USER_UPDATE_ANY` is intentionally NOT included per D-012
- Note: `TAG_SYSTEM_ASSIGN` is intentionally NOT included — any authenticated user can assign SYSTEM tags via `TAG_ASSIGN_ADD` per D-017

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/schemas/src/__tests__/enums/permission.enum.test.ts` (update existing)
- Assert: all 24 new values present; `TAG_USER_UPDATE_ANY` absent; `TAG_SYSTEM_ASSIGN` absent
- References: AC-F16, D-017

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- All 24 permissions named per `{ENTITY}_{ACTION}_{SCOPE}` convention
- Enum compiles with no TypeScript errors

tasks.title: Add SYSTEM role to RoleEnum for the system user
tasks.description:
Add a `SYSTEM` role to the existing `RoleEnum` for the reserved system user (non-loginable).

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/schemas/src/enums/role.enum.ts` — add `SYSTEM = 'SYSTEM'` value
- `packages/schemas/src/enums/index.ts` — already exports role.enum.ts, no change needed
- `packages/db/src/schemas/enums.dbschema.ts` — add `'SYSTEM'` to `rolePgEnum` values array

**Important:** The system user with this role has a non-loginable account state. This role is NOT assignable to regular users via UI. It is used exclusively by seeded system user (R-1).

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/schemas/src/__tests__/enums/role.enum.test.ts` (update existing)
- Assert: `RoleEnum.SYSTEM` exists; `RoleSchema.parse('SYSTEM')` succeeds
- References: D-005, R-1 seed

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- `SYSTEM` role value exists in TS enum and pgEnum
- Existing role values are not modified

tasks.title: Refactor tags DB schema: drop slug/notes, add type/ownerId/description
tasks.description:
Refactor the existing `tags` Drizzle schema to match the new User-Tag subsystem shape (D-018).

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/db/src/schemas/tag/tag.dbschema.ts`:
  - REMOVE: `slug` column (text, was unique)
  - REMOVE: `notes` column (text, nullable)
  - ADD: `description: text('description')` (nullable, replaces notes)
  - ADD: `type: tagTypePgEnum('type').notNull()` (import from enums.dbschema.ts)
  - ADD: `ownerId: uuid('owner_id').references(() => users.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' })` (nullable)
  - KEEP: `id`, `name`, `color`, `icon`, `lifecycleState`, and all audit fields

**Partial unique indexes to add (in the same file or separate index definitions):**
- `tags_internal_name_idx`: unique on `name` WHERE `type = 'INTERNAL'`
- `tags_system_name_idx`: unique on `name` WHERE `type = 'SYSTEM'`
- `tags_user_name_idx`: unique on `(ownerId, name)` WHERE `type = 'USER'`
- `tags_type_idx`: on `type`
- `tags_owner_id_idx`: on `ownerId`
- `tags_lifecycle_idx`: on `lifecycleState`

**Testing requirements:**
- No automated test needed at this layer (schema definition). Type-check validates shape.
- AC-F18 verified by schema: no `notes` column; `description` present
- References: D-018, D-002, D-004, AC-F18

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- TypeScript types derived from schema have no `slug`, no `notes`, have `type`, `ownerId`, `description`
- All 6 indexes defined in schema

tasks.title: Refactor r_entity_tag DB schema: add assignedById, change PK
tasks.description:
Refactor `r_entity_tag` Drizzle schema to add `assignedById` column and change the PK.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/db/src/schemas/tag/r_entity_tag.dbschema.ts`:
  - ADD: `assignedById: uuid('assigned_by_id').references(() => users.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }).notNull()`
  - CHANGE PK: from `(tagId, entityId, entityType)` to `(tagId, entityId, entityType, assignedById)` (composite PK per D-018)
  - ADD indexes:
    - `r_entity_tag_assigned_by_idx` on `assignedById`
    - `r_entity_tag_entity_idx` on `(entityType, entityId)` (if not already present)
  - KEEP: `tagId` FK (CASCADE), `entityId`, `entityType` columns

**Testing requirements:**
- Type-check validates shape. No separate unit test needed at schema layer.
- References: D-018, D-004, D-005, AC-F04, AC-F11, AC-F12

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- Schema `assignedById` is `NOT NULL`
- PK is composite 4-column: `(tagId, entityId, entityType, assignedById)`
- Two indexes defined

tasks.title: Create post_tags DB schema table
tasks.description:
Create the new `post_tags` Drizzle table definition for the PostTag subsystem.

**Files to create:**
- `packages/db/src/schemas/tag/post_tag.dbschema.ts`:
  - Table: `post_tags`
  - Columns: `id` (uuid PK, defaultRandom), `name` (text, notNull), `slug` (text, notNull), `color` (tagColorPgEnum, notNull), `icon` (text, nullable), `description` (text, nullable), `lifecycleState` (lifecycleStatusPgEnum, notNull, default ACTIVE), plus all standard audit fields (createdAt, updatedAt, createdById, updatedById, deletedAt, deletedById following existing patterns)
  - Unique indexes: `post_tags_name_idx` on `name`, `post_tags_slug_idx` on `slug`
  - Lifecycle index: `post_tags_lifecycle_idx` on `lifecycleState`

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/db/src/schemas/tag/index.ts` — export new schema
- `packages/db/src/schemas/index.ts` — include if needed (check existing pattern)

**Testing requirements:**
- TypeScript inference test: verify `typeof postTags.$inferInsert` has all required fields
- References: D-001, D-013, D-018, AC-F13

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- Table has `slug` column (PostTag has public URL, unlike user-tags per D-002)
- Name and slug both unique
- Audit fields present following existing Drizzle patterns

tasks.title: Create r_post_post_tag DB schema join table
tasks.description:
Create the `r_post_post_tag` Drizzle join table linking posts to PostTags.

**Files to create:**
- `packages/db/src/schemas/tag/r_post_post_tag.dbschema.ts`:
  - Columns: `postId` (uuid FK to `posts.id`, CASCADE on delete, notNull), `postTagId` (uuid FK to `post_tags.id`, CASCADE on delete, notNull)
  - PK: composite `(postId, postTagId)` — no per-user attribution per D-001
  - No audit fields (pure join table, consistent with other r_ join tables in the codebase)

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/db/src/schemas/tag/index.ts` — export new schema

**Testing requirements:**
- TypeScript type check: `typeof rPostPostTag.$inferInsert` has `postId` and `postTagId` only
- References: D-001, D-018, AC-F03 (PostTag assignment)

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- No `assignedById` (PostTag assignments are not per-user — they are editorial)
- Both FKs cascade on parent delete
- PK is composite `(postId, postTagId)`

tasks.title: Add SYSTEM_USER_ID constant to @repo/db
tasks.description:
Export a `SYSTEM_USER_ID` constant from a shared location in `@repo/db` for use by seeds, cron jobs, webhooks, and the tag service.

**Files to create/modify:**
- Create (or update if it exists): `packages/db/src/constants/index.ts`
  - Export: `export const SYSTEM_USER_ID = 'a0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001' as const;` (choose a deterministic, recognizable UUID)
  - Export: `export const SYSTEM_USER_EMAIL = 'system@hospeda.internal' as const;`
- If `packages/db/src/constants/` does not exist, create the directory and `index.ts`
- Update `packages/db/src/index.ts` to export from `./constants`

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/db/src/__tests__/constants/system-user.test.ts`
- Assert: `SYSTEM_USER_ID` is a valid UUID string; does not change between imports (frozen constant)
- References: D-005, R-1

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- The constant is a fixed, hard-coded UUID (not generated at runtime)
- Exported from package root so `import { SYSTEM_USER_ID } from '@repo/db'` works
- Value is the same UUID used in the system user seed (R-1 in T-036)

tasks.title: Apply DB schema changes via pnpm db:fresh-dev
tasks.description:
Validate that all schema changes (T-005 through T-008) compile and apply cleanly to the dev database.

**Steps:**
1. Ensure Docker DB is running (`pnpm db:start`)
2. Run `pnpm db:fresh-dev` to apply push-only schema changes (no migration files per D-003)
3. Verify no Drizzle push errors
4. Run `pnpm typecheck` across the monorepo to confirm no TypeScript errors introduced by schema changes

**Files affected:** None created — this is a validation checkpoint task.

**Testing requirements:**
- `pnpm db:fresh-dev` exits with code 0
- `pnpm typecheck` exits with code 0
- DB introspection: tables `post_tags`, `r_post_post_tag` exist; `tags` has `type`, `owner_id`, `description` columns; `r_entity_tag` has `assigned_by_id` column
- References: D-003, AC-F18

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- Zero TypeScript errors
- All new tables present in DB
- Old columns (`slug` on tags, `notes` on tags) absent from DB schema

**Note:** This task gates all subsequent layers (models, services, routes). Do not proceed past this task until the DB is green.

tasks.title: Refactor tag Zod schemas in @repo/schemas
tasks.description:
Update existing tag Zod schemas to match the refactored `tags` table shape (remove slug/notes, add type/ownerId/description).

**Files to create/modify:**
- `packages/schemas/src/entities/tag/tag.schema.ts` — update `TagSchema`, `CreateTagSchema`, `UpdateTagSchema`:
  - REMOVE: `slug` field
  - REMOVE: `notes` field
  - ADD: `type: TagTypeSchema` (from T-001)
  - ADD: `ownerId: z.string().uuid().nullable().optional()`
  - ADD: `description: z.string().nullable().optional()`
- `packages/schemas/src/entities/tag/tag.crud.schema.ts` — update create/update schemas:
  - Create: require `type`; `ownerId` required when `type = USER` (use `.refine()`); `ownerId` must be null when `type != USER`
  - Update: `type` is immutable (not updatable); `name`, `color`, `icon`, `description` are patchable
- `packages/schemas/src/entities/tag/tag.query.schema.ts` — add `type`, `ownerId` as optional filter params
- `packages/schemas/src/entities/tag/r_entity_tag.schema.ts` — update to include `assignedById: z.string().uuid()`

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/schemas/src/__tests__/tag/tag.schema.test.ts`
- Assert: `CreateTagSchema` with `type=USER` and no `ownerId` fails `.refine()`; `type=SYSTEM` with `ownerId` fails `.refine()`; valid inputs parse correctly
- References: AC-F01, AC-F02, D-002, D-018

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- Schema `.parse()` enforces type invariants: USER requires ownerId, SYSTEM/INTERNAL forbid ownerId
- No `slug` or `notes` in any tag schema

tasks.title: Create PostTag Zod schemas in @repo/schemas
tasks.description:
Create new Zod schemas for the PostTag subsystem.

**Files to create:**
- `packages/schemas/src/entities/tag/post-tag.schema.ts` — `PostTagSchema` with all fields including `slug`
- `packages/schemas/src/entities/tag/post-tag.crud.schema.ts` — `CreatePostTagSchema`, `UpdatePostTagSchema`:
  - Create: `name` (required), `slug` (required, must be lowercase URL-safe, validate with `.regex(/^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$/)`), `color` (required), `icon` (optional), `description` (optional), `lifecycleState` (optional, default ACTIVE)
  - Update: partial of Create (slug is patchable)
- `packages/schemas/src/entities/tag/post-tag.query.schema.ts` — `PostTagQuerySchema` for admin list: `lifecycleState`, `name`, pagination params
- `packages/schemas/src/entities/tag/post-tag.public.schema.ts` — `PublicPostTagSchema` (subset for public endpoint) with `withCounts: z.coerce.boolean().optional().default(false)`
- `packages/schemas/src/entities/tag/index.ts` — export all new schemas

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/schemas/src/__tests__/tag/post-tag.schema.test.ts`
- Assert: slug with uppercase fails; slug with spaces fails; valid slug `'gastronomia'` passes; duplicate enforcement is service-layer (schema allows it, tested separately)
- References: AC-F05-01, D-013, D-018

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- `CreatePostTagSchema.parse({ name: 'X', slug: 'invalid slug', color: 'BLUE' })` throws (space in slug)
- `PostTagSchema` has all required columns from D-018

tasks.title: Create tag permission helper schemas in @repo/schemas
tasks.description:
Create access-control check schemas/helpers for the tag permission matrix.

**Files to create:**
- `packages/schemas/src/tag/tag.access.schema.ts`:
  - `TagPickerVisibilitySchema` — enum of picker visibility rules per actor type
  - `PickerQueryContextSchema` — `{ actorId: string, hasTagInternalView: boolean }` input for service-layer visibility filter
  - `TagAssignInputSchema` — input for `assignTag()`: `{ tagId, entityId, entityType, assignedById }` — all required, `assignedById` is the actor or SYSTEM_USER_ID
  - `TagAssignRemoveInputSchema` — `{ tagId, entityId, entityType, assignedById }` for removal (4-column PK delete)
  - `ImpactCountResponseSchema` — `{ count: number }` for impact endpoints

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/schemas/src/__tests__/tag/tag.access.schema.test.ts`
- Assert: `TagAssignInputSchema.parse({...})` succeeds with all 4 fields; fails when any required field missing
- References: D-006, D-007, D-008, D-009

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- `assignedById` is required in assign schema — never optional
- Impact count schema used by both tag and postTag impact endpoints

tasks.title: Refactor TagModel and REntityTagModel in @repo/db
tasks.description:
Update the existing DB model classes to match the refactored schemas.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/db/src/schemas/tag/tag.dbschema.ts` (if model is co-located) or the model file — update all Drizzle queries referencing `slug`, `notes` to remove them; add queries for `type`, `ownerId`, `description`
- Create/update `packages/db/src/models/tag/tag.model.ts`:
  - `TagModel extends BaseModel` — update `findById`, `findMany`, `create`, `update` to reflect new columns
  - Add `findByType(type: TagTypeEnum)` for admin list filtering
  - Add `findByOwner(ownerId: string)` for user's own tag pool
  - Add `countActiveByOwner(ownerId: string)` for quota enforcement (used by advisory lock transaction in service)
  - Add `findPickerTags({ actorId, hasInternalView })` returning SYSTEM + optional INTERNAL + actor's USER tags, all ACTIVE
- Create/update `packages/db/src/models/tag/r_entity_tag.model.ts`:
  - `REntityTagModel extends BaseModel`
  - `findByEntityAndActor(entityId, entityType, actorId)` — filters by `assignedById = actorId`
  - `findByEntityAll(entityId, entityType)` — no filter (admin use with `TAG_VIEW_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS`)
  - `countByTagId(tagId)` — for impact endpoint
  - `deleteByTagIdEntityUser(tagId, entityId, entityType, assignedById)` — 4-column PK delete

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/db/src/__tests__/models/tag/tag.model.test.ts`
- Use real DB with vitest (pattern from SPEC-080/T-010 integration test approach)
- Assert: `countActiveByOwner` counts only ACTIVE USER tags; `findPickerTags` without `hasInternalView` excludes INTERNAL tags
- References: D-006, D-007, D-014, D-018, AC-F05, AC-F07

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- No query references `slug` or `notes` columns
- `findPickerTags` is the single source of truth for picker visibility logic at model layer
- `safeIlike` from `@repo/db` used for any name search (AC-F23, D-014)

tasks.title: Create PostTagModel and RPostPostTagModel in @repo/db
tasks.description:
Create new DB model classes for the PostTag subsystem.

**Files to create:**
- `packages/db/src/models/tag/post-tag.model.ts`:
  - `PostTagModel extends BaseModel`
  - `findById(id)`, `findMany(query)` with filters: `lifecycleState`, `name` (using `safeIlike`)
  - `findActive()` — for public endpoint (only ACTIVE, no pagination)
  - `findActiveWithCounts()` — for `?withCounts=true` (LEFT JOIN `r_post_post_tag` COUNT)
  - `create(data)`, `update(id, data)`, `delete(id)` (hard delete)
  - `countBySlug(slug)` — for unique slug validation in service
  - `getImpactCount(id)` — count of `r_post_post_tag` rows
- `packages/db/src/models/tag/r-post-post-tag.model.ts`:
  - `RPostPostTagModel extends BaseModel`
  - `setTagsForPost(postId, postTagIds[])` — replaces all tags for a post atomically (delete + insert in transaction)
  - `removeTagFromPost(postId, postTagId)` — single row delete
  - `findByPostId(postId)` — list of PostTags on a post
- Export both from `packages/db/src/models/tag/index.ts`

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/db/src/__tests__/models/tag/post-tag.model.test.ts`
- Assert: `findActive()` returns only ACTIVE PostTags; `findActiveWithCounts()` returns `usageCount: number` field; `setTagsForPost` is idempotent (double-apply gives same result)
- References: D-013, D-018, AC-F13, AC-F24

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- `findActive()` excludes INACTIVE and ARCHIVED rows
- `findActiveWithCounts()` returns correct join counts
- `safeIlike` used for name search (D-014)

tasks.title: Create PostTagService extending BaseCrudRelatedService
tasks.description:
Implement the PostTag service with CRUD operations, slug uniqueness, and impact count.

**Files to create:**
- `packages/service-core/src/services/tag/post-tag.service.ts`:
  - `PostTagService extends BaseCrudRelatedService`
  - `create(input: CreatePostTagInput)`: validate slug uniqueness (call `PostTagModel.countBySlug`); throw `ServiceErrorCode.CONFLICT` if duplicate; insert
  - `update(id, input: UpdatePostTagInput)`: if slug changed, validate uniqueness; update
  - `delete(id)`: hard delete via `PostTagModel.delete(id)` — FK cascades handle `r_post_post_tag`
  - `getImpactCount(id): Promise<Result<{ count: number }>>` — delegates to model
  - `listAdmin(query)`: all PostTags with filtering; uses `PostTagModel.findMany()`
  - `listPublic(withCounts: boolean)`: only ACTIVE PostTags; calls `findActive()` or `findActiveWithCounts()`; sets cache header via returned metadata
  - `setTagsForPost(postId, postTagIds[])`: validates each postTagId exists and is ACTIVE; delegates to `RPostPostTagModel.setTagsForPost`; requires `POST_TAG_ASSIGN` check at route layer
  - `removeTagFromPost(postId, postTagId)`: delegates to model
- `packages/service-core/src/services/tag/post-tag.permissions.ts`:
  - `assertCanCreatePostTag(actor)`, `assertCanUpdatePostTag(actor)`, `assertCanDeletePostTag(actor)`, `assertCanViewPostTag(actor)`, `assertCanAssignPostTag(actor)` — use `PermissionEnum` checks only per project convention

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/service-core/src/__tests__/services/tag/post-tag.service.test.ts`
- Assert: duplicate slug returns `Result` with error code CONFLICT; `listPublic(false)` returns only ACTIVE; `listPublic(true)` returns `usageCount` field
- References: AC-F05-02 (slug duplicate), D-011, D-013, AC-F13

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- Service returns `Result<T>` for all operations
- No role checks — only `PermissionEnum` checks
- `listPublic` does NOT paginate (realistic volume 50–200, per D-013)

tasks.title: Implement TagService type invariants and cross-type name collision check
tasks.description:
Refactor `TagService` to enforce type invariants and cross-type name collision at service layer.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/service-core/src/services/tag/tag.service.ts`:
  - In `create()` and `update()`: add `validateTypeInvariants()` private method:
    - If `type = USER` and `ownerId` is null/undefined → throw `ServiceErrorCode.VALIDATION` (AC-F01)
    - If `type IN (INTERNAL, SYSTEM)` and `ownerId` is not null → throw `ServiceErrorCode.VALIDATION` (AC-F02)
  - In `create()`: add `checkCrossTypeNameCollision()` private method:
    - Query TagModel for existing INTERNAL or SYSTEM tag with same `name` (case-insensitive)
    - If found and input type is USER → throw `ServiceErrorCode.CONFLICT` with message about reserved name (AC-F03)
    - Do NOT enforce this via DB constraint — service layer only per D-018 note
  - Invariant check runs BEFORE any DB write

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/service-core/src/__tests__/services/tag/tag.service.invariants.test.ts`
- AAA tests for each of AC-F01, AC-F02, AC-F03
- Assert: USER tag with null ownerId → error; SYSTEM tag with ownerId → error; USER tag colliding with SYSTEM tag name → 409-equivalent Result error
- References: AC-F01, AC-F02, AC-F03, D-002, D-018

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- Invariant validation is in a private method, called before DB access
- No DB constraint enforces this (service-layer only)
- Test covers all 3 error cases

tasks.title: Implement TagService quota enforcement with advisory lock
tasks.description:
Add USER tag quota check protected by PostgreSQL advisory lock to `TagService.create()`.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/service-core/src/services/tag/tag.service.ts`:
  - Add `getUserTagQuota()` private method: reads `HOSPEDA_TAG_USER_QUOTA_PER_USER` env var; parseInt; falls back to 50 if NaN or unset (AC-F17)
  - In `create()` for `type = USER`:
    1. Begin transaction
    2. Acquire advisory lock: `await db.execute(sql\`SELECT pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext(${ownerId}))\`)` (pattern from D-010/SPEC-064)
    3. Count active USER tags for owner: `TagModel.countActiveByOwner(ownerId)`
    4. If count >= quota → rollback and return `Result` with error code QUOTA_EXCEEDED (AC-F09)
    5. Insert tag row
    6. Commit
  - Advisory lock is auto-released at transaction end

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/service-core/src/__tests__/services/tag/tag.service.quota.test.ts`
- Test AC-F09: create 50 tags for user, attempt 51st → quota error, count still 50
- Test AC-F17: set env var to 5, create 5 tags, attempt 6th → quota error
- Test AC-F10 (concurrent race): two simultaneous creates at quota boundary → exactly quota tags created (advisory lock prevents both succeeding)
- References: AC-F09, AC-F10, AC-F17, D-010, D-021

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- Advisory lock pattern matches SPEC-064 implementation exactly
- Quota fallback to 50 when env var unset
- No tag is created when quota exceeded — no partial insert

tasks.title: Implement TagService picker visibility and entity-tag scoping
tasks.description:
Add picker visibility scoping and per-user entity-tag visibility to `TagService`.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/service-core/src/services/tag/tag.service.ts`:
  - `getPickerTags(actor, query?)`: Returns tags for the picker based on D-006:
    - Anonymous: throw UNAUTHORIZED
    - Authenticated user (no `TAG_INTERNAL_VIEW`): SYSTEM (ACTIVE) + actor's USER (ACTIVE)
    - Admin with `TAG_INTERNAL_VIEW`: INTERNAL + SYSTEM + actor's USER (all ACTIVE)
    - Apply name search via `safeIlike` if `query` provided (D-014)
    - Delegates to `TagModel.findPickerTags()`
  - `getTagsForEntity(entityId, entityType, actor)`: Returns tags per D-007:
    - Anonymous: return empty array (no user-tag for anonymous)
    - Authenticated user: filter `r_entity_tag` WHERE `assignedById = actor.id`
    - Admin with `TAG_VIEW_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS`: return all assignments with `assignedById` populated
    - Delegates to `REntityTagModel.findByEntityAndActor()` or `.findByEntityAll()`
  - `getPopularTags()`: updated to count DISTINCT entityId-based counts (not raw row count)

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/service-core/src/__tests__/services/tag/tag.service.visibility.test.ts`
- Assert: regular user picker excludes INTERNAL tags (AC-F07); user A cannot see user B's assignments on entity X (AC-F05); admin with `TAG_VIEW_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS` sees all (AC-F06)
- References: AC-F05, AC-F06, AC-F07, D-006, D-007

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- `getPickerTags` is gated on auth state — anonymous gets error
- Entity tag list returns only actor's assignments by default
- Admin attribution view requires explicit `TAG_VIEW_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS` permission check

tasks.title: Implement TagService entity-access check and assignedById injection on assign
tasks.description:
Add entity-access pre-check (D-009) and `assignedById` injection to `TagService.assignTag()`.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/service-core/src/services/tag/tag.service.ts`:
  - `assignTag({ tagId, entityId, entityType, actor })` method:
    1. Verify tag exists; if not → `Result` NOT_FOUND
    2. Check actor's picker visibility (D-008): tag type must be in actor's picker; if not → `Result` FORBIDDEN (AC-F07, AC-F05)
    3. Check entity access (D-009): call `EntityAccessRegistry.canView(entityType, entityId, actor)`; if false → `Result` FORBIDDEN (AC-F08)
    4. Inject `assignedById = actor.id` (never allow caller to pass arbitrary `assignedById` from outside)
    5. Insert into `r_entity_tag` with 4-column PK `(tagId, entityId, entityType, actor.id)`
    6. Duplicate assignment (same actor applies same tag to same entity) should be idempotent (upsert or check existing)
  - Create `packages/service-core/src/services/tag/entity-access-registry.ts`:
    - Simple registry mapping `EntityTypeEnum` → `canView(entityId, actorId) => Promise<boolean>`
    - Stub implementations for now that return `true` (actual entity service integration is follow-up for each entity type)
    - Log a warning when entity type has no registered checker
  - `removeAssignment({ tagId, entityId, entityType, actor })`: validates actor owns the assignment (`assignedById = actor.id`) before deleting

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/service-core/src/__tests__/services/tag/tag.service.assign.test.ts`
- Assert: assigning INTERNAL tag as regular user → FORBIDDEN (AC-F07); assigning to inaccessible entity → FORBIDDEN (AC-F08); two users assign same SYSTEM tag → two rows (AC-F04)
- References: AC-F04, AC-F07, AC-F08, D-008, D-009

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- `assignedById` always injected from `actor.id`, not from request body
- Both D-008 (picker visibility) and D-009 (entity access) checks happen before DB write
- AC-F04 scenario (two users, same SYSTEM tag, same entity) creates 2 rows

tasks.title: Implement TagService hard delete and impact count
tasks.description:
Add hard delete with impact count to `TagService` and update tag permission helpers.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/service-core/src/services/tag/tag.service.ts`:
  - `getImpactCount(tagId)`: count rows in `r_entity_tag` WHERE `tagId = tagId`; returns `Result<{ count: number }>`
  - `deleteTag(tagId, actor)`: permission check first (see permission matrix in spec); hard delete via `TagModel.delete(tagId)`; FK cascades handle `r_entity_tag` rows automatically (D-011); no service-layer cascade logic
  - Permission matrix for deleteTag:
    - INTERNAL: requires `TAG_INTERNAL_DELETE`
    - SYSTEM: requires `TAG_SYSTEM_DELETE`
    - USER (own): requires `TAG_USER_DELETE_OWN` + `ownerId = actor.id`
    - USER (any): requires `TAG_USER_DELETE_ANY` (super-admin)
- `packages/service-core/src/services/tag/tag.permissions.ts`:
  - Update to include all new permissions: `assertCanCreateTag`, `assertCanUpdateTag`, `assertCanDeleteTag` dispatching by tag type
  - New: `assertCanViewAllAssignments(actor)`, `assertCanViewAllUserTags(actor)`

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/service-core/src/__tests__/services/tag/tag.service.delete.test.ts`
- Assert: deleting INTERNAL tag without `TAG_INTERNAL_DELETE` → FORBIDDEN; deleting USER tag owned by self → success; deleting other user's USER tag without `TAG_USER_DELETE_ANY` → FORBIDDEN; after delete, `getImpactCount` returns 0 (cascade removed rows)
- References: AC-F11, D-011, D-012

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- `TAG_USER_UPDATE_ANY` permission does NOT exist anywhere — delete-only moderation per D-012
- Impact count endpoint returns count BEFORE delete
- No service-level cascade loop — DB FK cascades handle it

tasks.title: Implement TagService user-tag CRUD for own tags (USER type)
tasks.description:
Implement the user-facing USER tag CRUD operations in `TagService`: list own, create (wraps quota logic), update own, get impact.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/service-core/src/services/tag/tag.service.ts`:
  - `listOwnTags(actor, query?)`: Returns all USER tags WHERE `ownerId = actor.id` (all lifecycle states per D-022); apply name search if provided; used by user tag manager
  - `createUserTag(input, actor)`: wires through type invariant check (T-018) + quota+advisory lock (T-019); sets `ownerId = actor.id` and `type = USER` automatically
  - `updateOwnTag(tagId, input, actor)`: validates `ownerId = actor.id`; only `name`, `color`, `icon`, `description`, `lifecycleState` patchable; `type` is immutable
  - `getOwnTagImpactCount(tagId, actor)`: count `r_entity_tag` WHERE `tagId = tagId AND assignedById = actor.id` (user only sees their own assignments)
  - `getQuotaStatus(actor)`: returns `{ used: number, limit: number }` for the quota indicator bar in the user manager UI (AC-003-03)

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/service-core/src/__tests__/services/tag/tag.service.user-crud.test.ts`
- Assert: `listOwnTags` returns ACTIVE + INACTIVE + ARCHIVED (D-022); `updateOwnTag` with different `ownerId` tag → FORBIDDEN; `getQuotaStatus` returns correct `used` count
- References: AC-003-01 through AC-003-04, D-022

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- User cannot update another user's tag (ownerId check)
- `listOwnTags` returns all lifecycle states (not just ACTIVE) — user manager shows history
- `type` field is NOT patchable via `updateOwnTag`

tasks.title: Create PostTag admin and public API routes
tasks.description:
Implement all PostTag API routes under `/api/v1/admin/posts/tags` and `/api/v1/public/posts/tags`.

**Files to create:**
- `apps/api/src/routes/tag/post-tag/admin/index.ts`:
  - `GET /api/v1/admin/posts/tags` — list all PostTags; requires `POST_TAG_VIEW`
  - `POST /api/v1/admin/posts/tags` — create; requires `POST_TAG_CREATE`
  - `GET /api/v1/admin/posts/tags/:id` — get one; requires `POST_TAG_VIEW`
  - `PATCH /api/v1/admin/posts/tags/:id` — update; requires `POST_TAG_UPDATE`
  - `GET /api/v1/admin/posts/tags/:id/impact` — impact count before delete; requires `POST_TAG_VIEW`
  - `DELETE /api/v1/admin/posts/tags/:id` — hard delete; requires `POST_TAG_DELETE`
  - `POST /api/v1/admin/posts/:postId/tags` — set PostTags on post; requires `POST_TAG_ASSIGN`
  - `DELETE /api/v1/admin/posts/:postId/tags/:tagId` — remove PostTag from post; requires `POST_TAG_ASSIGN`
- `apps/api/src/routes/tag/post-tag/public/index.ts`:
  - `GET /api/v1/public/posts/tags` — list ACTIVE; no auth; `Cache-Control: public, max-age=600` header set (AC-F24, D-013)
  - Accepts `?withCounts=true` query param
- Wire new routes into `apps/api/src/routes/index.ts`

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `apps/api/test/routes/tag/post-tag.test.ts`
- Assert: unauthenticated GET public/posts/tags returns 200 with only ACTIVE tags; GET with `?withCounts=true` returns `usageCount`; `Cache-Control` header present; POST admin without `POST_TAG_CREATE` returns 403
- References: AC-F13, AC-F24, D-013

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- Public endpoint has no auth middleware
- `Cache-Control: public, max-age=600` set on public response
- Admin routes use `ResponseFactory` for consistent responses

tasks.title: Create admin API routes for INTERNAL and SYSTEM user-tags
tasks.description:
Implement admin routes for INTERNAL and SYSTEM user-tag CRUD under `/api/v1/admin/tags`.

**Files to create:**
- `apps/api/src/routes/tag/user-tag/admin/internal.ts`:
  - `GET /api/v1/admin/tags/internal` — list INTERNAL; requires `TAG_INTERNAL_VIEW`
  - `POST /api/v1/admin/tags/internal` — create; requires `TAG_INTERNAL_CREATE`
  - `GET /api/v1/admin/tags/internal/:id` — get one; requires `TAG_INTERNAL_VIEW`
  - `PATCH /api/v1/admin/tags/internal/:id` — update; requires `TAG_INTERNAL_UPDATE`
  - `GET /api/v1/admin/tags/internal/:id/impact` — impact count; requires `TAG_INTERNAL_VIEW`
  - `DELETE /api/v1/admin/tags/internal/:id` — hard delete; requires `TAG_INTERNAL_DELETE`
- `apps/api/src/routes/tag/user-tag/admin/system.ts`:
  - Same CRUD pattern for SYSTEM type; permissions use `TAG_SYSTEM_*`
- `apps/api/src/routes/tag/user-tag/admin/index.ts`:
  - Mount internal.ts and system.ts sub-routers
  - `GET /api/v1/admin/tags/:id/impact` — shared impact count endpoint (works for INTERNAL and SYSTEM)
- Wire into `apps/api/src/routes/index.ts`

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `apps/api/test/routes/tag/admin-internal.test.ts`
- Assert: POST internal without `TAG_INTERNAL_CREATE` → 403; GET internal returns only INTERNAL-type tags; PATCH does not allow `type` change; DELETE with `TAG_INTERNAL_DELETE` removes tag and assignments
- References: AC-004-01, AC-004-02, D-020

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- INTERNAL routes never return SYSTEM or USER tags
- SYSTEM routes never return INTERNAL or USER tags
- `type` field not patchable via PATCH

tasks.title: Create admin API routes for USER tag moderation and cross-user attribution
tasks.description:
Implement super-admin moderation routes for USER tags and entity attribution view.

**Files to create:**
- `apps/api/src/routes/tag/user-tag/admin/user-moderation.ts`:
  - `GET /api/v1/admin/tags/user` — list ALL USER tags across all owners; requires `TAG_VIEW_ALL_USER_TAGS`; paginated
  - `DELETE /api/v1/admin/tags/user/:id` — delete any USER tag; requires `TAG_USER_DELETE_ANY`
  - NO PATCH/UPDATE endpoint — moderation is delete-only per D-012
- `apps/api/src/routes/tag/user-tag/admin/entity-attribution.ts`:
  - `GET /api/v1/admin/entities/:type/:id/tags` — all assignments on entity with attribution; requires `TAG_VIEW_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS`; response includes `assignedById` and assigning user identifier
- Mount both in admin index router

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `apps/api/test/routes/tag/admin-user-moderation.test.ts`
- Assert: GET /admin/tags/user without `TAG_VIEW_ALL_USER_TAGS` → 403; DELETE /admin/tags/user/:id without `TAG_USER_DELETE_ANY` → 403; GET /admin/entities/:type/:id/tags returns all assignments with attribution (AC-F06); no PATCH route exists (D-012)
- References: AC-F06, AC-007-01, AC-007-02, AC-008-01, AC-008-02, D-012, D-020

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- No PATCH route — 405 if attempted
- `TAG_VIEW_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS` required for entity attribution view
- Response includes assigning user identifier on each assignment row

tasks.title: Create admin API routes for own USER tag CRUD

tasks.title: Create admin API routes for entity tag assignment

tasks.title: Create Admin UI: PostTag management section
tasks.description:
Implement the PostTag management section in the TanStack Start admin dashboard.

tasks.title: Create Admin UI: SYSTEM and INTERNAL tag management sections

Implement admin UI sections for managing SYSTEM and INTERNAL user-tags.

- `apps/admin/src/hooks/use-internal-tags.ts` — TanStack Query hooks for INTERNAL CRUD

**Access control:** INTERNAL section only visible to users with `TAG_INTERNAL_VIEW`. SYSTEM section visible with `TAG_SYSTEM_VIEW`. Gates via `beforeLoad` + `hasPermission` pattern from admin app.

**Testing requirements:**

- Assert: form has no slug field; `type` is not exposed to user (fixed to SYSTEM or INTERNAL per route); delete dialog shows impact count
- References: AC-004-01, AC-004-02, AC-004-03, D-012

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- No `slug` field in user-tag form
- `type` is hardcoded per route section (not user-selectable)

tasks.title: Create Admin UI: USER tag moderation and entity attribution view

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- No edit/rename action anywhere — delete only per D-012

tasks.title: Create Own-Tag Manager page in admin panel

tasks.title: Implement public PostTag-filtered post listing in web app
tasks.description:
Verify and align the public PostTag-filtered post listing (`/blog?tag=gastronomia`) with the new PostTag subsystem.

**Files to modify:**
- `apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/publicaciones/index.astro` — verify `tag` query param is consumed and passed to `GET /public/posts/tags` + post list filter; update API endpoint references to new routes

**Key behaviors to implement/verify:**
- `/publicaciones?tag=gastronomia` → filters by PostTag slug
- Non-existent slug returns empty list or 404 (AC-F14)
- Only ACTIVE PostTags linked to a post are shown on post detail
- INTERNAL user-tags NEVER appear on any public page (they are a different subsystem)

- Assert: `?tag=gastronomia` with ACTIVE PostTag returns matching posts; `?tag=spam` (unknown slug) returns empty or 404; INTERNAL user-tag slug never appears as URL filter (different subsystem)
- References: AC-F13, AC-F14, AC-006-01, AC-006-02, AC-006-03

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- Public URL filter works for ACTIVE PostTag slugs
- No leak of INTERNAL user-tag names in any public response
- Endpoint uses new route `/api/v1/public/posts/tags`

tasks.title: Add tags i18n namespace to es/en/pt locale files
tasks.description:
Add the `tags` i18n namespace covering both subsystems to all three supported locales.

**Files to create:**
- `packages/i18n/src/locales/es/tags.json` (primary, Argentina Rioplatense Spanish)
- `packages/i18n/src/locales/en/tags.json`
- `packages/i18n/src/locales/pt/tags.json`

**Key groups required in each file:**
- `tags.type.INTERNAL`, `tags.type.SYSTEM`, `tags.type.USER` — display names
- `tags.lifecycle.ACTIVE`, `tags.lifecycle.INACTIVE`, `tags.lifecycle.ARCHIVED`
- `tags.errors.quotaExceeded` (with `{limit}` param), `tags.errors.nameConflict` (with `{name}` param), `tags.errors.inaccessibleEntity`, `tags.errors.notVisible`
- `tags.picker.groupSystem`, `tags.picker.groupInternal`, `tags.picker.groupUser`, `tags.picker.createCTA`, `tags.picker.searchPlaceholder`, `tags.picker.quotaReached`
- `tags.manager.empty`, `tags.manager.createCTA`, `tags.manager.quotaLabel` (with `{used}` and `{total}` params)
- `tags.admin.title`, `tags.admin.createTitle`, etc.
- `tags.delete.systemMessage` (with `{name}` and `{count}`), `tags.delete.userMessage` (with `{name}` and `{count}`), `tags.delete.postTagMessage` (with `{name}` and `{count}`)
- `postTags.admin.title`, `postTags.admin.createTitle`, etc.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/i18n/src/index.ts` or namespace registry — register `tags` namespace

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/i18n/src/__tests__/tags.i18n.test.ts`
- Assert: all required key groups present in all 3 locales; no missing keys between locales; `{limit}` param present in quotaExceeded key
- References: AC-F19, D-015

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- All 3 locale files have identical key structure
- No hardcoded Spanish strings in components after this task

tasks.title: Implement required seed R-1: System User
tasks.description:
Seed the reserved system user with the fixed `SYSTEM_USER_ID` UUID.

**Files to create:**
- `packages/seed/src/required/systemUser.seed.ts`:
  - Idempotent: check if user with `SYSTEM_USER_ID` exists before inserting
  - Insert into `users` table: `id = SYSTEM_USER_ID`, `email = SYSTEM_USER_EMAIL`, `role = RoleEnum.SYSTEM`, `name = 'System'`, account state = non-loginable (set `emailVerified = false` or whatever the Hospeda pattern is for disabled accounts; check existing user seed for pattern)
  - Import `SYSTEM_USER_ID`, `SYSTEM_USER_EMAIL` from `@repo/db/constants`

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/seed/src/manifest-required.json` — add `systemUser` as first entry (all other required seeds depend on it existing)

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/seed/src/__tests__/required/systemUser.seed.test.ts`
- Assert: after seeding, user with `SYSTEM_USER_ID` exists in DB; running seed twice does not create duplicate
- References: AC-F20, D-005, R-1

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- Idempotent (safe to run multiple times)
- `SYSTEM_USER_ID` constant matches the UUID in the seed
- Role is `SYSTEM` (from T-004)

tasks.title: Implement required seeds R-2 and R-3: INTERNAL and SYSTEM user-tags
tasks.description:
Seed the baseline INTERNAL and SYSTEM user-tag sets.

**Source of truth for content:** `.claude/specs/SPEC-086-tag-system-refactor/tag-seeds.md`. Read that document for the canonical list of tag names, target entity types, suggested colors, and applier types. The doc currently defines 19 INTERNAL tags (Spam, Reportado, Verificado, Necesita revisión, Bloqueado, Demo/Test, Cliente VIP, Sospechoso, KYC pendiente, Trial expirado, Recuperación, Riesgo churn, Chargeback, Reembolso pendiente, Cobro fallido, Editorial pendiente, Foto baja calidad, Lenguaje ofensivo, Plagio sospechoso) and 20 SYSTEM tags (Romántico, Aventura, Relax, Trabajo remoto, Lujoso, Económico, Eco-friendly, Familiar, Para grupos, Para parejas, Apto mascotas, Para niños, Mejor en verano, Mejor en invierno, Al aire libre, Imperdible, Recomendado por locales, Gratuito, Pago, Reserva previa). If `tag-seeds.md` is updated, update this seed implementation to match — that doc is the single source of truth.

**Files to create:**
- `packages/seed/src/data/tag/internal-NNN-{slug}.json` — one JSON per INTERNAL tag from tag-seeds.md
- `packages/seed/src/data/tag/system-NNN-{slug}.json` — one JSON per SYSTEM tag from tag-seeds.md
- `packages/seed/src/required/internalTags.seed.ts`:
  - Reads internal-*.json files
  - Inserts each with `type = TagTypeEnum.INTERNAL`, `ownerId = NULL`, `lifecycleState = ACTIVE`, `createdById = SYSTEM_USER_ID`, `description` from JSON
  - Idempotent: upsert/check existence by `(type, name)`
- `packages/seed/src/required/systemTags.seed.ts`:
  - Reads system-*.json files
  - Inserts each with `type = TagTypeEnum.SYSTEM`, `ownerId = NULL`, `lifecycleState = ACTIVE`, `createdById = SYSTEM_USER_ID`, `description` from JSON
  - Idempotent: upsert/check existence by `(type, name)`

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/seed/src/manifest-required.json` — add both seeds after `systemUser` (order: systemUser → internalTags → systemTags)

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/seed/src/__tests__/required/internalTags.seed.test.ts`
- Assert: all INTERNAL tags from tag-seeds.md present after seed; all SYSTEM tags present; no `slug` column on any (D-002); `ownerId = NULL`; `createdById = SYSTEM_USER_ID`; double-run is safe (idempotent)
- Test the count matches tag-seeds.md (currently 19 INTERNAL + 20 SYSTEM — update assertion if doc changes)
- References: AC-F20, R-2, R-3, tag-seeds.md

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- Content matches `tag-seeds.md` exactly
- No `slug` field in seed data (removed from user-tag system per D-002)
- `createdById = SYSTEM_USER_ID` on all rows
- Idempotent

tasks.title: Delete obsolete 43 tag JSONs and create new tag/postTag JSONs from tag-seeds.md
tasks.description:
Reclassification simplified: per tag-seeds.md, the existing 43 files are obsolete and replaced wholesale by 25 INTERNAL + 30 SYSTEM + 34 PostTag JSONs.

**Files to delete:**
- All 43 files in `packages/seed/src/data/tag/*.json`

**Directories to create:**
- `packages/seed/src/data/postTag/` (new)

**Files to create per tag-seeds.md:**
- 25 internal-NNN-{slug}.json under data/tag/
- 30 system-NNN-{slug}.json under data/tag/
- 34 NNN-{slug}.json under data/postTag/

**Each JSON contains:**
- INTERNAL/SYSTEM: { name, description, color, lifecycleState: ACTIVE } — no slug per D-002
- PostTag: { name, slug, description, color, lifecycleState: ACTIVE }
- description: single-sentence Spanish from Use case column
- color: from TagColorPgEnum per implementer

**Source of truth:** `.claude/specs/SPEC-086-tag-system-refactor/tag-seeds.md`

**Testing:**
- `packages/seed/src/__tests__/data/tag-files.test.ts`
- Assert 25/30/34 file counts, JSON shape per schema, names unique within type
- References: tag-seeds.md, R-2, R-3, R-4

tasks.title: Implement required seed R-4: PostTags from tag-seeds.md
tasks.description:
Seed the 34 PostTags defined in tag-seeds.md.

**Source of truth:** `.claude/specs/SPEC-086-tag-system-refactor/tag-seeds.md` § POST_TAG (34).

**Files to create:**
- `packages/seed/src/required/postTags.seed.ts` — reads `packages/seed/src/data/postTag/*.json`, inserts each with createdById: SYSTEM_USER_ID, idempotent upsert by slug

**Testing:**

tasks.title: Implement example seeds E-1, E-2, E-3 with assignments per tag-seeds.md
tasks.description:
Build dev/staging fixtures including USER tags for non-super-admin test users plus realistic tag assignments on test entities.

**Source of truth:** `.claude/specs/SPEC-086-tag-system-refactor/tag-seeds.md` § Example Assignments (E-3).

**E-1 — USER tags for HOST/EDITOR/ADMIN test users:**
- File: `packages/seed/src/example/userTags.seed.ts`
- HOST: Reservar después, Cliente VIP, Necesita seguimiento, Para verano
- EDITOR: Pendiente edición, Para destacar, Verificar fuentes, Idea para post
- ADMIN: Revisar, Pendiente decisión, Caso de prueba, Para reunión
- type: USER, ownerId: <test-user-id>, createdById: <test-user-id>, lifecycleState: ACTIVE
- Super-admin gets NO USER tags

**E-2 — PostTag assignments to test posts:**
- File: `packages/seed/src/example/postTagAssignments.seed.ts`
- 2-4 PostTags per test post (mappings in tag-seeds.md)

**E-3 — Entity tag assignments per actor (per tag-seeds.md table):**
- File: `packages/seed/src/example/entityTagAssignments.seed.ts`
- HOST applies SYSTEM tags to own accommodations
- EDITOR applies SYSTEM tags to own posts
- ADMIN applies INTERNAL+SYSTEM tags across entities
- Each assignment uses correct assignedById

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/seed/src/manifest-example.json`

**Testing:**
- `packages/seed/src/__tests__/example/tag-assignments.seed.test.ts`
- Assert per-role USER tag counts (super-admin: 0); r_post_post_tag rows from E-2; r_entity_tag rows from E-3 with correct types and assignedById
- References: AC-F21, AC-F22, E-1, E-2, E-3, tag-seeds.md

tasks.title: Verify full seed pipeline with pnpm db:fresh-dev
tasks.description:
Run the complete seed pipeline and verify all seeds populate cleanly.

**Steps:**
1. `pnpm db:fresh-dev` — reset DB, apply schema, run required seeds
2. Query DB: verify `system_user_id` user exists; verify INTERNAL/SYSTEM/PostTag counts match expected
3. Run example seeds: `pnpm db:seed --example`
4. Query DB: verify example USER tags, PostTag assignments, entity-tag assignments
5. Run required seeds again (idempotency check): counts should not change

**Files affected:** No new files — validation checkpoint.

**Testing requirements:**
- File: `packages/seed/src/__tests__/integration/full-pipeline.seed.test.ts`
- Assert: required seed counts: 1 system user, 9 INTERNAL tags, 8 SYSTEM tags, N PostTags (from JSON files); example seed: HOST test user has 4 USER tags; `r_entity_tag` has rows with `assignedById` matching test user IDs; second required seed run doesn't change counts
- References: AC-F20, AC-F21, AC-F22

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- All seed counts match expected values
- No foreign key constraint violations
- `pnpm db:fresh-dev` exits 0

tasks.title: Write API integration tests for PostTag and INTERNAL/SYSTEM tag routes
tasks.description:
Write integration tests covering all PostTag admin/public routes and INTERNAL/SYSTEM user-tag admin routes.

**Files to create:**
- `apps/api/test/routes/tag/post-tag.admin.test.ts`:
  - Tests for CRUD + impact + assign/remove
  - Assert: AC-F13 (public returns only ACTIVE); AC-F24 (Cache-Control header); AC-F05-02 (duplicate slug returns 409); admin CRUD with correct permissions
- `apps/api/test/routes/tag/post-tag.public.test.ts`:
  - Unauthenticated GET; with/without `?withCounts=true`; Cache-Control header; INACTIVE PostTag not in response
- `apps/api/test/routes/tag/user-tag.internal.admin.test.ts`:
  - CRUD for INTERNAL type; permission gates (`TAG_INTERNAL_*`); impact count; cascade verify after delete
- `apps/api/test/routes/tag/user-tag.system.admin.test.ts`:
  - CRUD for SYSTEM type; permission gates (`TAG_SYSTEM_*`)

**Pattern:** Follow existing API test patterns in `apps/api/test/routes/`.

**Testing requirements (these ARE the tests):**
- Minimum 90% branch coverage on all new route files
- At minimum test: auth-required routes reject unauthenticated; permission-gated routes reject wrong permission; happy path CRUD; duplicate detection returns 409
- References: AC-F13, AC-F24, AC-004-01, AC-004-02, AC-004-03, D-013

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- `pnpm test` passes with all new tests green
- No `.only()` or hard-coded `.skip()` in committed tests

tasks.title: Write API integration tests for USER tag protected routes and moderation
tasks.description:
Write integration tests for protected USER tag CRUD, entity assignment routes, and super-admin moderation routes.

**Files to create:**
- `apps/api/test/routes/tag/user-tag.protected.test.ts`:
  - AC-F01: USER tag with null ownerId → 400 (schema validation)
  - AC-F02: SYSTEM tag with ownerId → 400
  - AC-F03: USER tag name colliding with SYSTEM → 409
  - AC-F09: 51st USER tag → quota error
  - AC-F10: concurrent creates at quota boundary → exactly quota tags (advisory lock)
  - AC-F17: env var quota override
  - AC-003-01 through AC-003-04: user manager scenarios
- `apps/api/test/routes/tag/entity-assignment.test.ts`:
  - AC-F04: two users apply same SYSTEM tag → two rows with different `assignedById`
  - AC-F05: user A's assignments not visible to user B
  - AC-F07: regular user applies INTERNAL tag → 403
  - AC-F08: apply tag to inaccessible entity → 403
- `apps/api/test/routes/tag/user-tag.moderation.test.ts`:
  - AC-F06: super-admin sees all assignments with attribution
  - AC-008-01: browse all USER tags with attribution
  - AC-008-02: super-admin deletes any USER tag
  - AC-007-02: regular user without `TAG_VIEW_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS` sees only own

**References:** AC-F01 through AC-F12, AC-F17

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- Every AC-F from AC-F01 to AC-F12 and AC-F17 has at least one test covering it
- Tests are independent (no shared state between test cases)
- Advisory lock test (AC-F10) uses parallel Promise.all to simulate concurrency

tasks.title: Write frontend component tests for TagPicker and UserTagManager
tasks.description:
Write component tests for the two main web UI components.

  - `aria-label="Tag usage: {used} of {total}"` on quota indicator

tasks.title: Write cascade and user-delete regression tests
tasks.description:
Write tests verifying DB-level cascade behaviors on tag delete and user delete.

**Files to create:**
- `packages/service-core/src/__tests__/services/tag/tag.service.cascade.test.ts`:
  - AC-F11: delete a tag → all `r_entity_tag` rows with that `tagId` are removed (cascade via FK)
  - AC-F12: delete a user → their USER tags are cascade-deleted → their `r_entity_tag` assignments (as both owner and `assignedById`) are cascade-deleted
  - Use real DB (integration test style per SPEC-080 pattern) or mock DB
  - Assert: after user delete, no orphaned `r_entity_tag` rows referencing deleted user as `assignedById`
  - Assert: after tag delete, no orphaned `r_entity_tag` rows referencing deleted tag
- Also test: after user delete, SYSTEM/INTERNAL tags (ownerId=NULL) are NOT deleted

**References:** AC-F11, AC-F12, D-004

**Acceptance criteria for this task:**
- Both AC-F11 and AC-F12 have explicit test cases
- `assignedById` cascade is tested independently from `ownerId` cascade
- Test verifies that SYSTEM/INTERNAL tags survive user deletion
